panel.title: Live2D Auto Layer
panel.subtitle: Split character images into transparent Live2D-ready layers.
panel.environment.title: Environment
panel.process.title: Layer extraction
panel.autoRig.title: AutoRig model
panel.cubism.title: Cubism handoff
panel.result.title: Latest result
panel.sessions.title: Sessions
panel.help.upload: Upload a front-facing character image, or use a local path below.
panel.help.inputPath: Use an absolute path when the image is already on this machine.
panel.help.layerSourcePath: A see-through worker output directory or PSD path. The plugin imports artifacts only and does not run the model internally.
panel.help.meshAlphaThreshold: Only affects AutoRig mesh/bbox generation. Exported PNG alpha is preserved; 0 keeps every non-zero alpha pixel.
panel.help.gptKey: Optional; leave empty to use local estimation.
panel.errors.title: Error
panel.errors.inputRequired: Upload an image or enter an image path.
panel.errors.layerSourceRequired: Enter an external layer directory or PSD path.
panel.errors.sessionRequired: A saved session is required for resegmentation.
panel.errors.recommendedNotReady: AnimeFace + SAM dependencies are not ready. Check the environment, or switch to Color fallback.
panel.errors.colorNotReady: Base image dependencies are not ready. Check the environment and install the missing dependencies.
panel.layers.name: Layer
panel.guide.title: Guide
panel.guide.body:
1. Upload a front-facing character image, or enter a local path.
2. Select only the parts you want to extract.
3. AnimeFace + SAM is recommended; K-Means is only a fallback.
4. Adjust parts or feathering and run resegmentation when needed.
5. ZIP, preview, and transparent PNG layers are saved under the output directory.

entries.checkEnvironment.name: Check Live2D Auto Layer environment
entries.checkEnvironment.description: Check Python packages, model files, and available devices for Live2D Auto Layer.
entries.splitImage.name: Split image into Live2D layers
entries.splitImage.description: Run the Live2D Auto Layer pipeline on a local image path and export PNG layers, preview, zip, and manifest.
entries.importLayerSource.name: Import external layer artifacts
entries.importLayerSource.description: Import layers from a local see-through output directory or PSD and export Live2D-ready PNG layers, preview, zip, and manifest.
entries.resegmentSession.name: Resegment Live2D layer session
entries.resegmentSession.description: Rebuild foreground from an exported session and rerun segmentation with new options.
entries.exportSession.name: Export Live2D layer session
entries.exportSession.description: Return ZIP artifact metadata for a Live2D Auto Layer session.
entries.exportAutoRigModel.name: Export NEKO AutoRig model package
entries.exportAutoRigModel.description: Generate a fully automatic NEKO AutoRig ZIP with model JSON, layer textures, generated meshes, parameters, and bindings. This is not a model3/moc3 model package.
entries.exportCubismHandoff.name: Export Cubism Editor handoff package
entries.exportCubismHandoff.description: Generate a Cubism Editor handoff ZIP with ordered PNG layers, CSV, metadata, and README. This is not a model3/moc3 model package.

entries.listSessions.description: List exported Live2D Auto Layer sessions.
entries.getSession.name: Get Live2D layer session
entries.getSession.description: Read a Live2D Auto Layer session manifest by session id.
entries.deleteSession.name: Delete Live2D layer session
entries.deleteSession.description: Delete a Live2D Auto Layer output session by session id.
